overview: A functional medicine wellness center offering personalized treatment plans for hormone imbalances, weight loss, and anti-aging concerns. Care is delivered through extended intake visits and follow-up appointments combining lab testing, nutrition, and integrative therapies.
highlights: Functional medicine with root cause analysis focus
IV nutritional therapy and vitamin injections
Multidisciplinary team of doctors, chiropractors, health coaches, and nutritionists
targetAudience: Patients with chronic conditions, hormonal imbalances, weight management goals, and those seeking functional medicine approaches to anti-aging and wellness.
